overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a gothic-style classroom interior from a video game, featuring vaulted wooden ceilings, students studying at long benches, and natural light streaming through tall arched windows. The scene remains completely stationary throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic classroom with wooden study benches and arched windows

entered.detail: three tall gothic arched windows with multiple panes allowing natural light to enter
ornate iron chandelier with multiple candle-style lights hanging from vaulted ceiling
large carved wooden door with decorative stone archway at the far end of the hall
long wooden tables arranged in rows for students
simple wooden benches paired with the study tables
tall wooden bookshelves and cabinets lining the right wall
raised stone platform or teacher's desk on the left side near the windows

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic-style classroom interior with vaulted wooden ceilings and tall arched windows on the left wall. Several students in dark robes sit at wooden benches studying, while ornate iron chandeliers hang from above. The room features a large carved wooden door at the far end and bookshelves along the right wall, with cool natural light mixing with interior ambient lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic gaze over a gothic-style classroom that remains poised in a state of quiet academic focus. It begins with a wide view of the interior, where cool natural light streams through tall arched windows on the left to illuminate students in dark robes studying at long wooden benches. As the eye wanders across the space, the composition emphasizes the height of the vaulted wooden ceilings and the ornate iron chandeliers hanging above. The scene then settles on the architectural depth of the room, framing the bookshelves lining the right wall and the large carved wooden door at the far end.
